extraction.one_line_summary: FROOME Chris won the 40km ITT taking 29 seconds from KELDERMAN Wilco after being 23 seconds down at the first intermediate checkpoint.
tactical_patterns: FROOME Chris deliberately rode conservative first half, sitting fourth at 23 seconds down before accelerating second half to victory.
CONTADOR Alberto rode aggressively for final career ITT despite no GC hopes, taking fifth and vaulting from ninth to fifth overall.
KELDERMAN Wilco's consistent pacing took second place and podium position while other podium contenders like ZAKARIN Ilnur hemorrhaged time.

rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: demonstrated tactical maturity by sitting fourth at first check then dominating second half when it mattered most
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: positive: consistent pacing earned second place 29 seconds down and lifted him onto overall podium replacing ZAKARIN Ilnur
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: positive: motivated performance in final career ITT vaulted him from ninth to fifth overall despite no realistic podium chances
rider_signals.CHAVES Esteban: negative: catastrophic collapse losing over four minutes to FROOME Chris signals complete form loss before final mountain stages
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: negative: lost podium position to KELDERMAN Wilco indicating vulnerability before crucial mountain finale tomorrow
rider_signals.LAMPAERT Yves: negative: showed fatigue mid-race despite being early starter with stage win ambitions as green jersey teammate
rider_signals.LUDVIGSSON Tobias: positive: set first significant benchmark at 48:07, beating junior world champion KÄMNA Lennard by 23 seconds
